items.scenario: You are a junior undergraduate planning your senior thesis. You met with Professor Tanaka briefly last week to discuss two possible research directions, but you have since discovered a new topic that excites you more. The deadline for finalizing thesis topics is in ten days.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Tanaka. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you are interested in the new topic
Ask whether switching topics after the meeting is allowed
Request a follow-up meeting to discuss the change
items.subject: Question about thesis topic switch before the deadline

items.scenario: You are a barista at the campus coffee shop. You have just been offered a one-time chance to attend a research talk by your favorite economist next Thursday evening, but it conflicts with your scheduled shift. You want your manager to help find coverage.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Karlsson. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the conflict with your scheduled shift
Suggest a colleague who could cover the shift
Offer to swap a future shift in exchange
items.subject: Coverage request for next Thursday's evening shift

items.scenario: You are a longtime member of the Maplewood Recreation Center, which announced last week that it will convert a vacant side lot into a community garden. The director has invited members to share ideas before construction begins next month. You have strong opinions on layout and accessibility.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Vasquez. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe how you currently use the center's outdoor space
Suggest a layout idea that improves accessibility for older residents
Ask whether members will be allowed to maintain individual plots
items.subject: Suggestions for the rec center's new outdoor garden

items.scenario: You recently ordered a portable Bluetooth speaker from an online electronics store. When the package arrived two days ago, the front grille was cracked and the pairing button refused to respond. You are still within the 30-day return window and have photos of the damage.
items.direction: Write an email to the Returns Department. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the damage to the speaker
Ask for a full refund or a verified replacement
Request confirmation of how to return the defective unit
items.subject: Bluetooth speaker delivered with cracked grille and broken pairing button
